indications.text: The whole plant is used, dried and powdered for infusion. It has properties similar to the European Ground Pine, being a powerful diuretic, promoting urine and removing obstructions of the liver and spleen. It is therefore, a valuable remedy in jaundice, rheumatism and most of the chronic diseases. A decoction of this plant, combined with Dandelion and Agrimony, is a highly recommended herbal remedy for liver complaints and obstructions. For EUROPEAN GROUND PINE, see (YELLOW) BUGLE .
